source: M&M FY25 consolidated EBITDA: ~15%, Aditya Birla (Grasim) FY25: ~18%, Tata Sons group-level. SEBI BRSR: top conglomerates (BSE100) median EBITDA ~14-18%.
M&M FY25: 11.6%, Aditya Birla Group: 8-15% (segment-mix dependent). Reliance FY25: ~3-4% (O2C-dominated). Conglomerate ratio heavily influenced by business mix.

kpi_name: Holding Company / Corporate HQ Cost % of Revenue
source: Hackett Group G&A 2024: world-class group holding cost 0.5-1% of consolidated revenue. Tata Sons, Aditya Birla Group management fees/corporate overhead disclosed in related-party notes.

kpi_name: Inter-Segment Transfer Pricing Efficiency (RELATED_PARTY % of Revenue)
source: SEBI LODR: related-party transactions disclosed in annual reports. M&M FY25: significant inter-company transactions (TechM, Mahindra Finance). SEBI BRSR Core: RPT benchmark.
M&M FY25 dividend yield: ~1.2%, Hindalco: ~0.8%, UltraTech: ~0.5%. BSE100 conglomerates median dividend yield ~1-2%. DPE CPSEs: typically higher dividend to GoI.
Companies Act Section 135: mandatory 2% of average net profit. M&M FY25: ₹1,800 Cr CSR. SEBI BRSR Core: mandatory assurance of CSR disclosures for top-1000 listed entities.
